This is a sample text file for testing document parsing.
It contains multiple lines of text to verify that the parse_txt function correctly extracts and returns the full content.

Each paragraph should be preserved in the output.
Special characters: é ñ ü 测试 русский
Numbers: 42 3.14159 -273.15
Symbols: @ # $ % & * ( ) [ ] { } < > + - = / \ | ; : ' " , . ? ! ~ ` ^ _
